THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC., ALSO DOING BUSINESS AS FILLMORE CENTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEWELL, GREGORY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL ST., #1003, SAN FRANCISCO. $2,454.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $368.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,322.30, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
